description_long: This is a compact, elegant chest of drawers with a sleek black finish and three equally sized drawers stacked vertically. Each drawer features a prominent, gold-colored ring pull handle set in a square backplate, adding a touch of sophistication and contrast to the otherwise minimalist design. The top surface is flat with gently rounded corners, suitable for placing small items or decor. The legs are slender and slightly tapered, giving the piece a light, elevated appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no additional ornamentation or hardware visible. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame, likely with metal hardware for the handles and drawer mechanisms.
description: A sleek black chest of drawers with three gold ring pull handles and slender, tapered legs. The design is minimalist and elegant, with a flat top and rounded corners.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with gold ring pull handles and the chest's flat top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, unadorned side panel and the profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless back panel and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg profile.
